title: Tyler Fisher
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Tyler Fisher''' wrote the backstory of [[BesGas Three]], and co-wrote the backstory of [[E-3PO]] appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

His alias is "Fisty Fiham" on [[StarWars.com]].

==Works==
===Bibliography===
*{{DB|location|besgasthree|BesGas Three}} - February [[2006]]
*{{DB|droid|e3po|E-3PO}} (co-written by ''The Phantom Calamari'' and ''ejmacki'') - February 2006
